debug_info.goal:
C : Set (Fin 3 → ℝ)
hC : Convex ℝ C
x y : Fin 2 → Fin 3 → ℝ
z : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) → Fin 3 → ℝ
hxy : ∀ (i j : Fin 2) (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)), x i + y j + z s ∈ C ↔ (i, j) ∈ s
⊢ False

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  let A (i j : Fin 2) : Fin 3 → ℝ := x i + y j
  have h_para : A 0 0 + A 1 1 = A 0 1 + A 1 0 := by
    simp [A]; abel
  let s1 : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1)}
  let s2 : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 1), (1, 0)}
  let s3 : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1), (0, 1)}
  let s4 : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1), (1, 0)}
  have h_mid (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) (h00 : (0, 0) ∈ s) (h11 : (1, 1) ∈ s) :
      (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 0 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 1 + z s) ∈ C :=
    hC (by rw [hxy]; exact h00) (by rw [hxy]; exact h11) (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  have h_mid' (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) (h01 : (0, 1) ∈ s) (h10 : (1, 0) ∈ s) :
      (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 1 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 0 + z s) ∈ C :=
    hC (by rw [hxy]; exact h01) (by rw [hxy]; exact h10) (by norm_num) (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  have h_eq (s : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2)) :
      (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 0 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 1 + z s) =
      (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 1 + z s) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 0 + z s) := by
    simp [smul_add, ← add_assoc, h_para]; abel
  have h_s2 : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 1 + z s2) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 0 + z s2) ∈ C :=
    h_mid' s2 (by norm_num) (by norm_num)
  have h_not_s2 : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 0 + z s2) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 1 + z s2) ∈ C := by
    rwa [h_eq]
  let s0 : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (1, 1)}
  let s_diag : Set (Fin 2 × Fin 2) := {(0, 0), (1, 1)}
  have : (0, 1) ∉ s_diag := by norm_num
  have : A 0 1 + z s_diag ∉ C := by rwa [hxy]
  have : A 1 0 + z s_diag ∉ C := by rwa [hxy]
  have : (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 0 1 + z s_diag) + (1 / 2 : ℝ) • (A 1 0 + z s_diag) ∈ C := by
    rw [← h_eq]; apply h_mid; norm_num; norm_num
  sorry
